persona.name: Sebastian Garcia
persona.emotional_disposition: Passionate about the game, level-headed in crisis
persona.motivations_goals: Lead the soccer team to state finals and secure a college athletic scholarship
persona.communication_style: Direct, encouraging to teammates, uses sports analogies
persona.knowledge_scope: Soccer strategies, fitness training, team psychology
persona.backstory: Immigrated from Colombia at age 8, found belonging through soccer

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Isabella, you ready for the big game tomorrow?
actions.plan: I should grab a quick snack before heading to soccer practice. Maybe I can chat with Isabella about the upcoming game strategy.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay together! Let's move as a group!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd and stay with them for safety.

actions.dialog_text: Keep moving, everyone! Stay close and don't fall behind!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, and the crowd is moving towards hallway2. I should stay with the group and follow them to safety.

actions.dialog_text: Stay together, everyone! We’re almost to the exit!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the garden, and the crowd is moving towards the far_right_yard. I should stay with the group and follow them to safety.

memories.description: I decided to talk to Isabella about the upcoming soccer game while grabbing a snack in the cafeteria.
I heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd towards hallway1, urging everyone to stay together for safety.
I followed the crowd towards hallway2, urging everyone to stay close and keep moving to avoid the shooter in the cafeteria.
I followed the crowd towards the far_right_yard, encouraging everyone to stay together as we moved closer to the exit.
